The '''Annoo-dat Prime''' were the original [[Annoo-dat]] species. Four-eyed reptilian warriors, they desolated and abandoned their original homeworld [[Annoo (original)|Annoo]], and conquered nearby [[Annoo (Gelefil)|Gelefil]], thereafter known as Annoo. They were known to have preternatural strength, reflexes, and speed. As well as being reptilian in nature, they had the ability to see into the infrared spectrum, and taste the air in a way reminiscent of snakes. Annoo-dat Prime were also known on rare occasions to be born with two pairs of functional arms, an atavistic throwback to an ancestral form. They had large tails and were typically 8 feet tall.

A notable Annoo-dat was [[Ashaar Khorda]], a terrorist who attempted to destroy [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the central system of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Khorda was stopped and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]].
